# velia_server_label (Resource)

Manages the label of a Velia server. The server itself is provisioned externally; this resource only controls its label. Destroying the resource clears the label.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "velia_server_label" "example" {
  server_id = 12345
  label     = "web-01"
}
```

## Import

Import using the server ID:

```shell
terraform import velia_server_label.example 12345
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `label` (String) Label to assign to the server. Set to an empty string to clear the label.
- `server_id` (Number) ID of the server to label.
